message:
fix(runtime): Handle string literals in pyStrFormat

Add toSlice helper to coerce pointer-to-array types like *const [2:0]u8
to []const u8 slices. String literals in Zig have type *const [N:0]u8
which was not being recognized as a valid string type by findArg.

This fixes the flufl test which was failing because code.format("<>")
was returning empty strings instead of the formatted operators.

The fix handles:
- Direct slices ([]const u8, []u8)
- Pointer to array (*const [N:0]u8 from string literals)
- Returns null for non-string types (returns empty string in caller)
